creator: daniel@blodan.se
text:
Realized as soon as I saw your error line that for some bafoonish reason i managed to wipe the post-install part of my changes when cleaning up the Makefile before posting the PR.

Uploading a new patch in a minute with post-install commands, just making sure the one I'm uploading passes testport with both perl/python flag on and off.

Sorry to have wasted your time with a non-complete patch.
